details.subtitle: August 2023 – Present
details.intro: As an engineering student at IMT Atlantique, I’ve built a strong foundation in mathematics, programming, and economics before specializing in Product Management, Artificial Intelligence, and Supply Chain Strategy. This multidisciplinary background allows me to bridge data, technology, and business — turning analytical insights into impactful, user-centric AI products.

sections.title: 🔹 Third Year – Product Management, AI & Supply Chain
sections.content: In my final year, I focused on how to design, build, and manage AI-driven products while applying data science and optimization to real business problems.
list: Product Management: Product strategy, user research, MVP definition, PRD writing, stakeholder communication
AI & Advanced Analytics: LLMs, Generative AI, MLOps, Product metrics, AI ethics & governance
Supply Chain & Operations: Demand forecasting, network optimization, logistics simulation, operations management
Management & Leadership: Business strategy, innovation management, and agile project delivery

sections.title: Projects
list: GraphRAG @ Airbus: PM & Data Science internship optimizing knowledge retrieval (+50% accuracy, +70% accessibility)
JobSwipe AI: Product-led AI app that generates tailored CVs, cover letters, and interview prep
AutoDocs: AI documentation generator reducing manual doc time by 80%
Supply Chain Simulator: Multi-echelon inventory optimization using MILP and heuristic algorithms
Strategic Business Case: Market entry & pricing simulation for a digital logistics platform

sections.title: 🔹 Second Year – Specialization in Data Science & AI
sections.content: I deepened my expertise in machine learning, artificial intelligence, and business strategy through hands-on academic and professional experiences.
list: Data Science & AI: Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Ethics & Economics of AI
Business & Strategy: Entrepreneurship, Organizational Analysis, Financial Strategy
Finance & Self-Learning: Financial Markets, Empirical Finance, Portfolio Management & Trading Algorithms

sections.title: Professional experience
list: Entrepreneurship: Designed a ride-sharing mobile app (from problem discovery to prototype)
DECART Project: Strategic analysis on the future of industrial skills (qualitative & quantitative research)

sections.title: Projects
list: Phishing Link Detection using NLP & Deep Learning
Netflix Data Study with AI (segmentation & recommendation)

sections.title: 🔹 First Year – Foundations in Science, Engineering & Economics
sections.content: A comprehensive introduction to mathematical modeling, programming, and business fundamentals — establishing the analytical foundation for later AI and PM work.

details.conclusion: Through these three years, I’ve built a strong analytical and strategic mindset — combining AI, business, and operations to deliver measurable impact. This experience shaped my ambition to work as an AI / Tech Product Manager driving innovation at the intersection of data, product, and user experience.

title: Preparatory class, Classe préparatoire MPSI-PSI*
place: Lycée Pierre de Fermat, Toulouse, France

details.subtitle: September 2021 - July 2023
details.intro: I pursued an intensive two-year preparatory program (Classes Préparatoires aux Grandes Écoles – CPGE) at Lycée Pierre de Fermat in Toulouse, specializing in mathematics, physics, and engineering sciences.

sections.title: 🔹 Second Year – PSI* (Physics & Engineering Sciences)
sections.content: As part of the top-ranked PSI* class in France (2022-2023), I developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills through an advanced curriculum:
list: Mathematics & Analysis: Linear Algebra, Differential & Integral Calculus, Geometry, Probability & Statistics, Game Theory, Optimization, Differential Equations, Arithmetic, Functional Analysis
Physics & Engineering Sciences: Mechanics, Electromagnetism, Thermodynamics, Waves & Optics, Quantum Physics, Fluid Mechanics, Materials Resistance, Structural Analysis, Energy Systems
Computer Science & Modeling: Programming (Python, C), Algorithms & Data Structures, Computational Complexity, Graph Theory, Databases, System Modeling, Control Systems, Sensors & Communication
Industrial Project: Applied engineering skills to real-world collaborative projects

sections.title: 🔹 First Year – MPSI (Mathematics, Physics & Engineering Sciences)
sections.content: During my first year, I built a solid foundation in advanced mathematics, physics, and computer science:
list: Mathematics: Algebra, Analysis, Geometry, Differential & Integral Calculus, Probability
Computer Science & Programming: Algorithms, Data Structures, Python Programming

details.conclusion: This demanding program strengthened my problem-solving abilities, technical expertise, and analytical thinking, preparing me for advanced studies in data science, artificial intelligence, and engineering.

title: French Baccalauréat, High School Diploma
description: Graduated with Honors, Physics and Mathematics

details.subtitle: September 2018 - June 2021
details.intro:
I completed my Baccalauréat Général at Lycée Nelson Mandela in Pibrac, France, with a specialization in Physical Sciences, graduating with Highest Honors.

During these years, I honed my skills in mathematics, engineering sciences, and physics, gaining a deep understanding of core scientific principles:

sections.title: 🔹 Key Skills Acquired
list: Engineering Sciences: Materials Resistance, System Modeling, Dynamics of Systems
Physics & Chemistry: Mechanics, Thermodynamics, Optics, Physical Chemistry

sections.title: 🏅 Achievements
sections.content: I graduated with Mention Très Bien, a recognition of my commitment to academic excellence and my dedication to mastering scientific concepts.

details.conclusion: This experience at Lycée Nelson Mandela laid the foundation for my further studies in engineering, data science, and AI, preparing me for the next step in my academic journey.
